meaning: n.夸张之言,豪言壮语,豪语
examples: Cheerful words, sweet words, grandiloquence, nonsense, and silence are the five steps to get drunk. it can drown people though the cup is shallow.
Instead Mr Semel, charming and funny in private, increasingly resorts in public to pre-cooked, vague grandiloquence laden with the jargon of "Web 2.0".
Now the challenge is to avoid the welter of grandiloquence and rule-bending that undermined so many previous schemes.
